name: Apple Impromptu
recipeInstructions:
1. Place apple slices in an 8 or 9 inch pie plate sprayed with vegetable cooking spray.
2. Sprinkle 1/4 cup sugar and cinnamon over the apples.
3. Cover with foil.
4. Bake at 400°F for 20 minutes.
5. Mix remaining ingredients until smooth.
6. Spread mixture evenly over the apples.
7. Bake at 400°F for an additional 20-25 minutes.
